SnowReport.Report:
Thursday, March 5, 6:01am -  After a dusting of new snow last night, today will be sunny, with highs in the mid-30s. Slight breeze, with northeast winds of 10-15 mph and gusts of up to 25 mph. Enjoy the groomers today, off-piste conditions may be variable, so ski and ride with caution and be prepared for changing surface conditions. Follow the sun for softer, spring conditions.

Tip: The Belmont Terrain Park is a great place for park progression on small to medium sized features. 

Please remember to ski with caution and leave plenty of room for stopping, and allow at least 15 feet between yourself and other riders.  

  • Parking reservations are every weekend and holiday. Learn more about our Parking Program and Carpool Incentives.
  • For real time information at your fingertips, download the Ikon Pass App for updates on lift status, events, weather, and more.
SnowReport.Alert: In an emergency, please contact: Palisades Dispatch 1 (530) 452-7145 | Alpine Dispatch 1 (530) 581-8222
